Hello, world!
This is a sample text file for testing Matcha.

fn main() void {
    const std = @import("std");
    std.debug.print("Hello from Zig!\n", .{});
}

Line 10: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Line 11: Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs.
Line 12: How vexingly quick daft zebras jump.
Line 13: The five boxing wizards jump quickly.

// Testing various characters:
// Brackets: () [] {} <>
// Symbols: @#$%^&*+-=~`
// Quotes: "double" 'single' `backtick`

End of test file.
